name: Seeded + lexical-aware expansion
description: Port of the parent's `seeded-lex` strategy. Builds a seed set from global cosine top-K plus an approximate token+trigram lex channel fused via RRF, then expands best-first through the schema graph. Child scoring blends cosine (shaped per `lexExpand.scoreShape`) with a synthetic lex bonus so high-lexical-rank children survive the per-expansion cap. Closes the slice with paths-to-root. Eval shortcuts: no per-template variants, no synonymy bridges, BM25/trigram approximated from field-name token overlap (eval snapshot has no description text or precomputed channel indexes).
